mnemonics: TEST: Transparency, Equity, Safety, Trust - the four pillars of ethical AI testing.
keyPoints: Testing for AI must include checks for bias and fairness to ensure equitable outcomes.
Robustness and security testing is crucial to prevent adversarial attacks and ensure system safety.
Test results and methodologies should be transparent and documented for accountability and public trust.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on technical performance metrics (e.g., accuracy) while ignoring broader ethical implications.
Assuming a system is unbiased because it performs well on a limited or non-representative test dataset.
